# croft.click

> Landing page for Ewan Croft's suite of open-source AT Protocol tools.

croft.click is the central hub for a collection of browser-based tools that help users move their data to the open social web via the AT Protocol (ATProto). All tools are free, open-source, and run in the browser with no server-side data storage.

## Tools

- Crypto Contact (crypto.croft.click): Store crypto contacts in your ATProto repository and publish Ethereum, Bitcoin, or Monero wallet addresses with cryptographic ownership proofs.
- Hasharium (hasharium.croft.click): Generate stable geometric specimens from decentralised identifiers and curate a local study tray.
- Jasper (jasper.croft.click): Import Instagram photos, stories, and videos to Grain or Spark on ATProto. Original timestamps preserved, duplicates skipped.
- Malachite (malachite.croft.click): Import Last.fm and Spotify listening history to Teal (fm.teal.alpha lexicon). Smart deduplication and sync support.
- Bismuth (bismuth.croft.click): Convert ATProto richtext-block documents from Standard.site publications (Leaflet, Pckt, Offprint) to Markdown.
- Opal (opal.croft.click): Convert microblog posts from Twitter, Mastodon, Threads, and Nostr to Bluesky. Original timestamps preserved.
- Tourmaline (tourmaline.croft.click): Analyse Teal.fm scrobble history. Personality archetypes, genre profiles, mood mapping, and share-to-Bluesky.
- Devlog (devlog.croft.click): Changelog and devlog for Ewan's projects, published via Sequoia on ATProto.

## Pages

- /: Project index with cards for all tools

## Source

https://github.com/ewanc26/pkgs

## Author

Ewan Croft — https://ewancroft.uk
